summary: Finished the integrity sweep a spend limit cut off last session: all 13 published works are now checked for on-screen contradictions, and the self-audit's central '0 of 9' count survived an independent re-derivation. Three new defects were found and recorded — not yet fixed, since every fix must pass review first — the sharpest being a sentence on the taxonomy work that was never updated after the very case disproving it was added.
